UserAgent.name: get_exposure_stream
UserAgent.description: Per simulation step: request algorithm recommendations (GetAlgorithmRecomendationEvent), deliver pending @/repost notifications (MentionEvent), replay keep-following blogs (KeepFollowingEvent), and build social feed from followed authors (SocialRecommendationEvent). Updates last_login_timestamp on profile.

required_variables.name: current_blogs
required_variables.description: Blogs visible in the current time window (from StartEvent / env.current_blogs).

required_variables.name: mentions
required_variables.description: Pending @/repost notifications for this user (from env.mention_pool via StartEvent).

required_variables.name: follow_ids
required_variables.description: Followed user IDs for social feed filtering.

required_variables.name: recommended_blog_ids
required_variables.description: Blog IDs already seen; used to skip duplicates in social feed.

required_variables.name: keep_following_blog_ids
required_variables.description: Blog IDs to re-expose next round after LLM keep-following decision.

UserAgent.name: generate_memory_from_own_blogs
UserAgent.description: Reflect on own blogs published in the current window: generate self-memory via LLM and optionally add supplementary reposts on own posts (no mention notifications).

required_variables.name: current_blogs
required_variables.description: Current blog window; filtered to blogs authored by this user.

output_updates.name: content_pool
output_updates.description: May gain new self-reposts via AddRepostEvent.

UserAgent.name: receive_recommendation
UserAgent.condition: Triggered by SocialRecommendationEvent, AlgorithmRecommendationEvent, SearchResultEvent, or KeepFollowingEvent
UserAgent.description: Consume recommended blogs from social/algorithm/search/keep-following channels; run UserAgentGates + LLM to decide reposts, @mentions, keep-following, and search; write reposts to content_pool and mention_pool.

required_variables.name: recommendations
required_variables.description: Batch of blog_id -> blog dict from the incoming recommendation event.

required_variables.name: recommended_blog_ids
required_variables.description: Historical recommended blog IDs on profile.

output_updates.name: content_pool
output_updates.description: New repost entries appended as top-level blog_id keys.

output_updates.name: keep_following_blog_ids
output_updates.description: At most one blog ID carried to next round.

UserAgent.name: handle_mention
UserAgent.description: Process @/repost notifications: LLM decides whether to repost/reply; writes reposts via AddRepostEvent and updates mention_pool; may trigger search.

output_updates.name: mention_pool
output_updates.description: Processed mentions removed; new notifications added.

output_updates.name: mentioned_blog_ids_by_channel
output_updates.description: Per mention_type step snapshots for metrics.

Algorithm.name: update_current_blogs
Algorithm.description: Sync Algorithm profile current_blogs from StartEvent for hot/popularity/random/interest recommendation and search candidate pools.

output_updates.name: current_blogs
output_updates.description: Algorithm profile mirror of env current_blogs.

Algorithm.name: send_recommendation_results
Algorithm.description: Run random / popularity / interest recommendation for requesting user; return AlgorithmRecommendationEvent with sampled blog batch.

required_variables.name: current_blogs
required_variables.description: Candidate blog pool for this step.

required_variables.name: recommended_blog_ids
required_variables.description: Blogs already recommended to this user (dedup input).

required_variables.name: type
required_variables.description: Algorithm type: Random Recommendation | Popularity Recommendation | Interest Recommendation.

Algorithm.name: send_search_results
Algorithm.description: Run relevant search over current_blogs for the query; return SearchResultEvent.
